name: user.call_tool_demo
title: Call Tool Demo
description: Sample Python user tool that calls safe core Unreal MCP tools through the injected call_tool helper.
reason: Committed sample for composing core tools from the project-local Python user-tool track; not part of the canonical core registry.
notes: Sample only. Copy this directory to <ProjectDir>/Tools/UnrealMcpPyTools/call_tool_demo/ and run unreal.mcp_user_registry_reload before calling user.call_tool_demo.
